titleStmt.title: SII 39.139: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 139. (A.R. No. 139 of 1916.) MĒLŪR, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. SUGANDAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIJAYAGAṆḌAGŌPALADĒVA-5TH YEAR (1255 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to a gift of 100 paṇam to the Śivabrāhmaṇa for preparing food offerings to the shrine of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭamuḍaiya-Tiruvuḍai-nāchchiyār in the temple of Tirumaṇaṅga-araiya-nāyaṉār at Vallūr of Nāyarunāḍu in Puḻarkōttam by two persons Arulālaṉ-vānavaṉ and Arulālapperumāḷ-Tiruppālaivaṇamuḍaiyāṉ-Cheḻiyakōṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ civicaiyakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 5 vatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattināḷ
puḻaṟkoṭṭattu nāyaṟunāṭṭu vallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tirumaṇaṅkā Araiya nāyanār tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya tiruvuṭainācciyāṟkku Ivvūṟ pākaṉ Aruḷanen vāṉakāvāṉ Aruḷḷāḷap
perumāḷ tiruppaālavaṉa muṭaiyāṉ ceḻiyakoṉ cantirātittavarai celuttuvatāka vaitta Amutupaṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku kuṟuṇi nellu cantirātittavarai Amutupaṭi
celuttuvatāka kuṭutta paṇam 100 Ippaṇam nūṟum kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai celuttuvatāka Ikkoyiṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabhrāhmaṇar bhāradvājagotrattu
ceṉāpatipaṭṭaṉ periya niṭṭārum Ikkuṭi taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉ paṭṭa Avaiyam pukkāṉuḷḷiṭṭārum kauśikagotrattu nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉ caraṇapaṭṭaṉum Āḷumpirāṉpaṭṭaṉ civañāṉatevarum
Ippaṇam nūṟum kaikkoṇṭom nāṟpatteṇṇāyira caraṇappiḷḷaiyum ceṉavati periya nā Uḷḷiṭṭārum taḻuvakkuḻaiñcāṉ Avaiyam pukkāṉuḷḷiṭṭārum civañāṉa tevarum Ivvaṉaivom kaikkoṇṭom Ivai paṉmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
